name: Loading Dock
narrativeHook: The loading dock sits below the tower's south entrance — a cavernous concrete space that smells of diesel and cardboard. Most deliveries arrive during business hours, but the security camera footage tells a different story after midnight.
storyArc: The agent investigates the loading dock and discovers a ghost truck that arrives at 3AM from 'Lazarus Medical' — a company with no public records. The freight elevator behind bay 4 provides direct access to floors 62-65 (BioSciences) and 71-75 (Nightfall Ops), bypassing all intermediate security checkpoints. Dr Cross's authorisation code 'auth-sigma-7' appears on the freight manifests. This floor connects the mailroom anomalies to the BioSciences and Nightfall operations.

characters.role: Player — exploring the loading dock after hours
Tom mentions the 3AM deliveries in passing — 'I don't handle those ones'
Dex knows about the freight elevator but won't talk about it directly
Dr Cross's name appears on freight manifests as authorising officer

objectives.description: Identify the 3AM ghost truck: a vehicle from 'Lazarus Medical' that makes unlogged deliveries to the loading dock every Tuesday and Thursday.
Discover the freight elevator in bay 4 provides direct access to floors 62-65 and 71-75, bypassing all intermediate security zones.
Find Dr Cross's authorisation code 'auth-sigma-7' on the freight manifests — linking the ghost deliveries to BioSciences.

elevatorKey.description: Use auth-sigma-7 as the freight elevator override code to access restricted floors.
